message:
feat(lax,trace): expand FFT implementation and tracing instrumentation

- fj-lax/fft.rs: expand FFT primitive implementation with additional
  transform modes and improved numerical accuracy
- fj-trace/lib.rs: extend tracing library with additional instrumentation
  points and trace event types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
